Uses of Package
neqsim.process.automation

Packages that use neqsim.process.automation
Package
Description
neqsim.mcp.runners
 
neqsim.process.automation
Stable automation API for programmatic interaction with running NeqSim process simulations.
neqsim.process.diagnostics
Equipment-level operational diagnostics and root cause analysis.
neqsim.process.operations
Operational study helpers that connect P&ID semantics, plant data, automation addresses, and NeqSim process simulations.
neqsim.process.processmodel
 
  • Classes in neqsim.process.automation used by neqsim.mcp.runners
    Class
    Description
    SimulationVariable
    Describes a single variable exposed by a unit operation in a process simulation.
  • Classes in neqsim.process.automation used by neqsim.process.automation
    Class
    Description
    AutomationDiagnostics
    Provides self-diagnosis, fuzzy matching, and error-recovery capabilities for the ProcessAutomation API.
    AutomationDiagnostics.DiagnosticResult
    A diagnostic result returned when an operation fails, containing the error analysis, closest suggestions, and auto-correction attempt.
    AutomationDiagnostics.ErrorCategory
    Classification of automation errors for structured remediation.
    AutomationDiagnostics.OperationRecord
    Tracks a single automation operation for learning.
    AutomationDiagnostics.PhysicalBound
    Represents physical bounds for a property value.
    AutomationDiagnostics.ScoredName
    Helper for sorting names by match score.
    ProcessAutomation
    Provides a stable, string-addressable automation API for interacting with a running NeqSim ProcessSystem or ProcessModel.
    ProcessAutomation.ResolvedUnit
    Holds a resolved unit and its address prefix for variable naming.
    SensitivityAnalyzer
    Gradient and Jacobian computation over the agent-facing ProcessAutomation API.
    SensitivityAnalyzer.Mode
    Perturbation mode.
    SimulationVariable
    Describes a single variable exposed by a unit operation in a process simulation.
    SimulationVariable.VariableType
    Variable access type.
    TransactionalBatchResult
    Outcome of a call to ProcessAutomation.setValuesTransactional(java.util.Map, String).
    TransactionalBatchResult.RollbackCategory
    Classifies why a batch was rolled back (or null when committed).
    TransactionalBatchResult.WriteOutcome
    Per-write outcome inside a transactional batch.
    WriteValidationResult
    Outcome of a write validation.
    WriteValidationResult.Severity
    Severity classification for a validation result.
    WriteValidator
    Strategy interface for validating writes to a specific equipment class before they are applied to the simulation.
    WriteValidatorRegistry
    Registry of WriteValidator instances keyed by equipment class.
  • Classes in neqsim.process.automation used by neqsim.process.diagnostics
    Class
    Description
    ProcessAutomation
    Provides a stable, string-addressable automation API for interacting with a running NeqSim ProcessSystem or ProcessModel.

    Provides a stable, string-addressable automation API for interacting with a running NeqSim ProcessSystem or ProcessModel.
